trackRecord.method: retrodiction with in-season rosters — an upper bound. Frozen opening-night backtest (13 seasons, 2013-26): mean ρ 0.544, range 0.25-0.74, ≈5.8 wins MAE, 70% playoff-team hit rate
retrodiction with in-season rosters — an upper bound. Frozen opening-night backtest (13 seasons, 2013-26): mean ρ 0.544, range 0.25-0.74, ≈5.8 wins MAE, 70% playoff-team hit rate

trackRecordMethod: retrodiction with in-season rosters — an upper bound. Frozen opening-night backtest (13 seasons, 2013-26): mean ρ 0.544, range 0.25-0.74, ≈5.8 wins MAE, 70% playoff-team hit rate

frozenRecord.method: frozen first-3-games rosters, prior-season WAR only, walk-forward win model — the honest preseason record

rookiePatch.name: Gavin McKenna
rookiePatch.note: #1 overall 2026 — valued at the historical #1-pick debut mean for his position (+0.74 WAR over 12 forward #1s, 2010–2025; a pick who didn't play counts 0)

note: Preseason projection from each club's contract-reality roster — everyone with 2026-27 control (signed or RFA rights), including NHL-tested prospects — rated as the best dressable lineup (top 13 F + 7 D + 2 goalies; one-way deals seat ahead of two-way depth, and a fresh multi-year commitment holds a seat), talent only, no in-season form. Balanced-schedule odds until the 2026-27 slate is published. Move players between teams to see a hypothetical trade re-rate both clubs. Points include expected overtime-loser points (≈22% of games go past regulation), so totals sit on the real standings scale — the league averages ≈91.
